name: Wuhu Token Sciences Co., Ltd.
summary: Wuhu Token Sciences Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacturing, sale, and service of vacuum deposited thin film materials. It offers touch integrated flat displays, including transparent ITO conductive glass, touch sensor, TFT-LCD cell slimming, touch modules, TFT-LCD LCM, and touch integrated TFT-LCD display modules. Its products include coating, touch glass, glass processing, and glass thinning. Wuhu Token Sciences Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is based in Wuhu, China.
